basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) Recruitment 2026: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 2 Project Associate-I posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B. Tech in Civil/ Chemical/ from a recognized University
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (PAT-I): B.E./ B. Tech in Civil/ Chemical/ from a recognized University. Handling of project management database, coordination of meetings, events, business meet etc.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA for those candidates who have qualified CSIR-UGC / ICAR / ICMR NET lectureship / Assistant professorship or GATE OR Those who have qualified National level examinations conducted by Central Government conducted by Central Government Departments like DBT/DST or equivalent and / or their Agencies / Institutions. Rs. 25,000/- + HRA for others who do not fall under the above category.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I (PAT-I): B.E./ B. Tech in Civil/ Chemical/ from a recognized University. Handling of project management database, coordination of meetings, events, business meet etc.

content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Age Limit
CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA for those candidates who have qualified CSIR-UGC / ICAR / ICMR NET lectureship / Assistant professorship or GATE OR Those who have qualified National level examinations conducted by Central Government conducted by Central Government Departments like DBT/DST or equivalent and / or their Agencies / Institutions. Rs. 25,000/- + HRA for others who do not fall under the above category.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28th July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue with all required documents between 09:30 AM and 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a B.E./ B. Tech in Civil/ Chemical/ from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 31,000/- + HRA for candidates who have qualified NET/GATE or equivalent, and Rs. 25,000/- + HRA for others.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Project Associate-I post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring a passport-size photo, Aadhaar card, 10th, 12th, Graduate marksheets, Degree, Graduate mark sheets (original and photocopy), and a filled application form.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the CSIR NEERI located?
faq.answer: CSIR NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in-Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
